title: Basic Routes
description: Define multiple routes in a React application using BrowserRouter, Routes, and Route.
problemStatement:
Multi-page app! Load `react-router-dom`. Wrap your `App` in `BrowserRouter`. Inside, define two routes: `/` rendering `Home` and `/about` rendering `About`.

**Requirement:** Use the `<Routes>` and `<Route>` components from the library.
hints: The `element` prop on `<Route>` takes a component (e.g., `<Home />`).
expectedOutput: A React Router setup with two working paths
